subject: A serpentine sliver creature with dark scaled wings and a lava-red underbelly, rearing in a smoky grassland with fire around it
description: A single sliver creature occupies the center of the frame, its body coiling in an S-curve. The upper body is covered in dark grey-black scales and large wings are partially spread. The belly and ventral area glow red-orange like molten rock or living lava. The head is crowned with a fan of red-orange tentacle-like appendages. Below, its serpentine lower body coils at ground level where small fires are burning in dry grass. The sky above is stormy grey. The image is primarily dark with high-contrast fiery reds and oranges from the belly and head.
foreground: Sliver creature rearing, lava-belly glowing, fires at ground level
